query:
UPDATE bot_config SET value = '1200', description = 'Max total capital ($1200 deployment)' WHERE `key` = 'maxTotalCapital';
INSERT INTO bot_config (`key`, value, description) VALUES ('maxDrawdownPercent', '40', 'Hard drawdown stop at -40%') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = '40', description = 'Hard drawdown stop at -40%';
